statement: A rectangular block (width 0.3 m, height 0.5 m, depth 0.4 m) with mass 10 kg is mounted on a rotating shaft along the z-axis. The shaft rotates at 300 rpm. Find the dynamic bearing reactions at the shaft supports due to the rotating imbalance. The center of mass is offset 5 mm from the shaft axis.
common_student_errors: Treating this as a 2D planar problem when the rotating imbalance creates 3D force couples
Using 2D equilibrium equations for what is fundamentally a 3D dynamics problem
Not recognizing that rotating imbalance involves 3D inertia tensors and is far beyond 2D rigid body scope
